name: Google UX Design Certificate
description: Seven-course program covering UX research, wireframing, prototyping, and usability testing. Emphasis on human-centered design principles and building accessible, inclusive user experiences.

name: Meta Front-End Developer Certificate
description: Comprehensive program covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and responsive design. Practical projects build toward a portfolio-ready capstone with real-world review criteria.

name: AWS Cloud Practitioner
description: Foundational certification covering core AWS services, cloud architecture, pricing, and security fundamentals. Validates working knowledge of cloud infrastructure and deployment patterns.

name: Introduction to Typography
issuer: California Institute of the Arts / Coursera
description: Four-week deep dive into type history, classification, hierarchy, and pairing. Practical assignments applying typographic principles across editorial and screen-based design problems.

name: Blender Character Modeling Masterclass
description: In-depth course covering polygonal modeling, UV unwrapping, texturing, and rigging for 3D characters. Focused on production-ready workflows and clean, efficient topology.

name: Color Theory & Application
description: Systematic coverage of color psychology, harmony, contrast, and accessibility in design. Applied to brand identity, digital interfaces, and print production workflows.

name: Video Editing: Premiere Pro
description: End-to-end editing course from importing footage to color grading and final export. Covers multi-cam sequences, audio mixing, pacing, and motion graphics integration.

name: Photography Fundamentals
description: Comprehensive program covering exposure, composition, lighting, and post-processing. Portfolio-based assessment with instructor feedback from working photographers.

name: Figma UI Design Bootcamp
description: Hands-on course building production-ready UI components, auto-layouts, interactive prototypes, and component libraries. Structured to reflect real-world design system workflows.

name: Freelance Business Foundations
description: Business-side program covering client acquisition, proposal writing, contracts, pricing strategy, and scope management. A practical toolkit for running an independent creative practice.

name: Motion Design with After Effects
description: Motion principles, keyframe animation, easing curves, and compositing applied to title sequences, UI animations, and explainer video production.

name: Advanced CSS & Animations
description: Deep-dive into CSS architecture, custom properties, grid layout, and performant keyframe animations. Focus on shipping polished, maintainable code that scales.

name: 3D Art for Real-Time Engines
description: Bridging offline rendering knowledge with real-time constraints — optimizing assets, baking maps, and building environments in Unreal Engine for interactive and immersive projects.
